name: Lesotho

outbound_official.note: no official Lesotho government outbound visa-list page located; rely on destination-side data. foreignaffairs.gov.ls/Home/Consular explicitly states the Ministry does not issue visas for overseas travel and cannot provide definitive information on visas, directing citizens to contact foreign embassies/consulates directly. foreignaffairs.gov.ls/Home/CountryList returns HTTP 500. homeaffairs.gov.ls covers only inbound immigration. No enumerated outbound visa-free destinations list found on any *.gov.ls domain.

visa_policy.notes: Visa policy sourced from the official Lesotho Embassy in USA (lesothoemb-usa.gov.ls). Countries marked * in the original source only require a visa for stays exceeding 14 days; for 14 days or less, no visa is required (these are classified visa_free with max_stay_days=14). Countries shown as plain 'NO' in the source have no visa requirement; no specific stay duration is stated on the official page for these entries. The official e-visa system is currently suspended (homeaffairs.gov.ls/e-visa); applications processed by email at VISA-Applications.Immigration@gov.ls. UN passport and Laissez Passer holders do not need a visa. Diplomatic and Official/Service passport holders require a visa but it is issued free. Ordinary passport visa fees: M1000 single entry, M2000 multiple entry. Processing: maximum 10 working days; approved applicants receive a 72-hour visa-on-arrival letter for entry at Maseru Port of Entry and Moshoeshoe I International Airport only. The official table contains internal duplicate/legacy rows for 'North Korea' (YES) vs 'Korea (Democratic People's Republic)' (NO) and 'Samoa' (YES) vs 'Western Samoa' (NO); the formally-named rows are treated as authoritative.

conditional_access.conditions: Citizens of China holding diplomatic or service passports may enter Lesotho without a visa for up to 30 days, under the Agreement on Mutual Visa Exemption between the People's Republic of China and the Kingdom of Lesotho (entered into force 24 August 2016). Stays exceeding 30 days require residence formalities with local authorities. Ordinary Chinese passport holders still require a visa. The reciprocal arrangement covers diplomatic and official passports of Lesotho for entry to China.

cbi.notes: No citizenship-by-investment program found on official government sources. Dual citizenship is permitted under the Eighth Amendment to the Constitution Act, 2018 (enacted 22 December 2018). Naturalization requires 5+ years of lawful residence per homeaffairs.gov.ls. Source: https://www.homeaffairs.gov.ls/immigration/

programs.name: Business Residence Permit
programs.notes: Business permit is one of the categories of residence permits issued by the Lesotho Department of Immigration Services. Minimum investment amount not specified on official page. After 5+ years of lawful residence, non-citizens may apply for citizenship.

programs.name: Two-Year Residence Permit
programs.notes: General residence permit valid for 2 years. Categories include missionaries, business, joining relative, spouse joining spouse, returning former citizens, doctors/nurses, teachers. Minimum requirements not specified on official page.

programs.name: Indefinite Residence Permit
programs.notes: Indefinite (permanent) residence permit available. Application criteria and minimum requirements not specified on official page. Source: https://www.homeaffairs.gov.ls/immigration/

agreements: SADC Protocol on Facilitation of Free Movement (signed 2005)

Agreement on Mutual Visa Exemption between the People's Republic of China and the Kingdom of Lesotho (entered into force 24 August 2016) - covers diplomatic/service passports of China and diplomatic/official passports of Lesotho; max stay 30 days

validation_notes: REVALIDATED 2026-06-29: Full re-fetch of lesothoemb-usa.gov.ls/visa/ confirmed. Complete raw table extracted and cross-checked against all existing visa_free entries. No additions or removals required.
REVALIDATED 2026-06-29: USA (USA) confirmed NO (no asterisk) - plain no-visa, no 14-day cap. max_stay_days=null is correct.
REVALIDATED 2026-06-29: UK (GBR) confirmed NO (no asterisk) - plain no-visa, no 14-day cap. max_stay_days=null is correct.

REVALIDATED 2026-06-29: Asterisk (*) countries confirmed as exactly: Australia, Belgium, Canada, Czech Republic, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Iceland, Italy, Luxembourg, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Portugal, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland - 18 countries, matching existing record.
REVALIDATED 2026-06-29: e-visa system at homeaffairs.gov.ls/e-visa still suspended; email applications only (VISA-Applications.Immigration@gov.ls). e_visa array correctly remains empty.
REVALIDATED 2026-06-29: homeaffairs.gov.ls/immigration confirmed no new permit categories; residence permit structure unchanged.

REVALIDATED 2026-06-29: EU visa-free arrangement (cabinet-approved May 14, 2025 by PM Matekane at Lesotho-EU Partnership Dialogue) has NOT been formally enacted into law. The EU delegation's own published announcement (eeas.europa.eu) makes no reference to visa-free travel. Cannot be recorded as active policy. EU member states not on the official visa-free table remain visa-required.

REVALIDATED 2026-06-29: foreignaffairs.gov.ls/Home/Consular loaded; confirms Ministry does not issue outbound visas and entry managed by Department of Immigration. No country-level visa-free list published here.

REVALIDATED 2026-06-29: Internal duplicate rows detected in the official table: (1) 'Korea (Democratic People's Republic) NO NO' vs 'North Korea YES YES' - formally-named DPRK row treated as authoritative, PRK remains visa_free; (2) 'Western Samoa NO NO' vs 'Samoa YES YES' - 'Western Samoa' is the former name of WSM, treated as authoritative, WSM remains visa_free.
CONFIRMED: The China-Lesotho diplomatic/service passport exemption (max 30 days) in conditional_access is unchanged.
CONFIRMED: No CBI or golden visa / investor residence program; cbi.has_program correctly false.

NOTE: Non-official sources (embassies.net, visaindex.com) incorrectly list Austria, Cyprus, Bahamas, Bangladesh, Cameroon, Ireland, Maldives, Malta, Nauru, San Marino, Solomon Islands as visa-free for Lesotho. Official lesothoemb-usa.gov.ls/visa/ table shows all of these as 'YES' (visa required). These are NOT added to visa_free.
PRIOR CORRECTION (still valid): conditional_access[0].max_stay_days set to 30 based on Chinese MFA source (cs.mfa.gov.cn) stating stays of up to 30 days for China diplomatic/service passport holders.
added gov.ls to official_domains as the primary Lesotho government portal.
gaps: The official source (lesothoemb-usa.gov.ls) is a JS-rendered DataTable; max_stay_days for non-asterisked visa-free countries are not stated explicitly - only that no visa is required. Wikipedia suggests 90 days for some but this is not confirmed by a primary official source.
No official list explicitly enumerating all Commonwealth countries exempted found; the Ministry of Home Affairs states 'some Commonwealth countries' are exempt but does not enumerate them.
The official e-visa system is currently suspended (homeaffairs.gov.ls/e-visa states 'eVISA Applications System Suspended'); applications handled by email.
No official fast-track, digital nomad, startup visa, or skilled worker visa program found on official sources.
No official CBI or golden visa / investor residence program found.
Minimum investment/financial requirements for business and residence permits not specified on official pages.
The SADC Protocol on Facilitation of Free Movement (2005) is listed in the Ministry of Home Affairs legislation section, but full implementation details are not on the official page.
foreignaffairs.gov.ls/Home/CountryList was inaccessible (server errors) and the downloadable country list could not be retrieved.
No official Lesotho government page found listing credential-based conditional rules (e.g., visa-free for holders of US/UK/Schengen visas or residence permits, or OCI cardholders).

Cabinet-approved EU visa-free arrangement (announced May 14, 2025 for ordinary passports, up to 14 days) has not been formalized into a legal instrument on any Lesotho government domain as of 2026-06-29; cannot be recorded as active policy. Monitor lesothoemb-usa.gov.ls/visa/ for table updates.

The full text of the Lesotho-China Mutual Visa Exemption Agreement (2016-08-24) was confirmed via the official Chinese MFA list (cs.mfa.gov.cn) but was not independently located on a Lesotho government domain.
No bilateral diplomatic/service passport agreements beyond China-Lesotho were confirmed on official sources.
lesothohc.org.uk/dealing-with-lesotho/travel-advice-passport-and-entry-requirements/ returned empty content on 2026-06-29 re-fetch; content unavailable for verification.

The official visa table contains duplicate/conflicting entries for North Korea (PRK): 'Korea (Democratic People's Republic) NO' vs 'North Korea YES'. The DPRK formal-name row is treated as authoritative but should be re-verified if the Lesotho Embassy updates its DataTable.

The official visa table contains duplicate/conflicting entries for Samoa (WSM): 'Western Samoa NO' vs 'Samoa YES'. The Western Samoa legacy row treated as authoritative but should be re-verified if the Lesotho Embassy updates its DataTable.

visa_types.name: Single Entry Visa
visa_types.purpose: Permits a single journey to Lesotho for tourism, family visits, or other short-term purposes. Issued to ordinary passport holders from countries not exempt from visa requirements.
visa_types.notes: Fee is M1,000 (Lesotho Maloti). e-Visa system is currently suspended; applications submitted by email to VISA-Applications.Immigration@gov.ls. Processing maximum 10 working days. Upon approval, a 72-hour visa-on-arrival authorization letter is emailed; traveller must enter via Maseru Port of Entry or Moshoeshoe I International Airport only. USD equivalent not stated in official source.

visa_types.name: Multiple Entry Visa
visa_types.purpose: Permits multiple journeys to Lesotho within the validity period for tourism, business visits, or other short-term purposes. Issued to ordinary passport holders requiring a visa.
visa_types.notes: Fee is M2,000 (Lesotho Maloti). Valid for 6 months with multiple entries. e-Visa system suspended; applications by email to VISA-Applications.Immigration@gov.ls. Maximum 10 working days processing. Approval results in a 72-hour visa-on-arrival letter for entry at Maseru Port of Entry or Moshoeshoe I International Airport only. Per-stay duration not specified in official source.

visa_types.name: Diplomatic / Official Visa
visa_types.purpose: Issued free of charge to holders of diplomatic, official/service, UN, or Laissez Passer travel documents visiting Lesotho.
visa_types.notes: UN Passport holders, Laissez Passer holders, Diplomatic Passport holders, and Official/Service Passport holders are issued visas free of charge. UN Passport and Laissez Passer holders do not need a visa at all according to official source. Application process same as ordinary visa (email to VISA-Applications.Immigration@gov.ls).

visa_types.name: Business Residence Permit
visa_types.purpose: Authorises foreign nationals to reside and conduct business activities in Lesotho. Available as a two-year or indefinite permit.
visa_types.notes: Two-year or indefinite duration available. Applications processed at the Residence Permit Facilitation Centre in Maseru. Minimum investment not specified on official pages. After 5+ years of lawful residence, may qualify for citizenship. Fee schedule referenced in Aliens Control (Amendment of Schedule) Regulations 2018 but amounts not published online.

visa_types.name: Teacher's Permit
visa_types.purpose: Residence permit allowing qualified foreign teachers to reside and teach in Lesotho.
visa_types.notes: Available as a two-year or indefinite permit. Processed at the Residence Permit Facilitation Centre in Maseru. Specific eligibility requirements and fees not published on official pages.

visa_types.name: Doctor's and Nurses Permit
visa_types.purpose: Residence permit allowing foreign medical professionals (doctors and nurses) to reside and practice in Lesotho.
visa_types.notes: Available as a two-year or indefinite permit. Processed at the Residence Permit Facilitation Centre in Maseru. Specific eligibility requirements and fees not published on official pages.

visa_types.name: Study Permit
visa_types.purpose: Authorises foreign nationals to reside in Lesotho for the purpose of studying at an accredited institution.
visa_types.notes: Valid for up to 4 years per official immigration page. Processed at the Residence Permit Facilitation Centre in Maseru. Specific eligibility requirements, supporting documents, and fees not published on official pages.

visa_types.name: Joining Relative Permit
visa_types.purpose: Residence permit allowing a foreign national to join a relative who is lawfully resident in Lesotho.
visa_types.notes: Available as a two-year or indefinite permit. Also referred to as 'Joining Relative Permit' and 'Spouse Joining Spouse Permit' (separate sub-categories). Processed at the Residence Permit Facilitation Centre in Maseru.

visa_types.name: Spouse Joining Spouse Permit
visa_types.purpose: Residence permit allowing a foreign spouse to join a partner lawfully resident or working in Lesotho.
visa_types.notes: Available as a two-year or indefinite permit. Also listed as 'Married Women Permit' in official source which likely covers the same or similar category. Processed at the Residence Permit Facilitation Centre in Maseru.

visa_types.name: Missionary Permit
visa_types.purpose: Residence permit for foreign nationals engaged in missionary or religious work in Lesotho.
visa_types.notes: Available as a two-year or indefinite permit. Processed at the Residence Permit Facilitation Centre in Maseru. Specific requirements and fees not published on official pages.

visa_types.name: Temporary Permit
visa_types.purpose: Short-term permit for foreign nationals who require an authorised stay in Lesotho beyond a visa or for purposes not covered by standard visa categories.
visa_types.notes: 90-day temporary permit listed as a distinct permit category on the official immigration page. Specific eligibility, requirements, and fees not published on official pages.

visa_types.name: Indefinite Residence Permit
visa_types.purpose: Permanent residence authorisation for foreign nationals who have met the long-term residence requirements in Lesotho.
visa_types.notes: Indefinite permit categories mirror the two-year permit categories: missionaries, business, joining relative, spouse joining spouse, returning former citizens, doctors/nurses, teachers. Minimum residence period and eligibility criteria not specified on official pages. Processed at the Residence Permit Facilitation Centre in Maseru.
